hero.description: Transforming spaces with innovative lighting solutions that combine aesthetics, functionality, and sustainability.

slide1.title: Al-Burhan Group
slide1.subtitle: Light Up Your Life
slide1.description: Transforming spaces with innovative lighting solutions that blend elegance, functionality, and cutting-edge technology to create breathtaking environments.

slide2.title: Innovation
slide2.subtitle: Leading Lighting Solutions
slide2.description: Pioneering the future of illumination with state-of-the-art LED technology, smart lighting systems, and energy-efficient designs that redefine modern living.

slide3.title: Excellence
slide3.subtitle: Premium Quality Products
slide3.description: Crafted with precision and passion, our premium lighting collections combine exceptional craftsmanship with luxurious materials to elevate any space.

slide4.title: Design
slide4.subtitle: Elegant Lighting Designs
slide4.description: Where artistry meets functionality. Our curated designs seamlessly integrate aesthetic beauty with practical innovation, creating timeless pieces that inspire.

slide5.title: Experience
slide5.subtitle: 20+ Years of Expertise
slide5.description: Drawing from over two decades of industry excellence, we deliver unmatched expertise in lighting design, installation, and project implementation across the globe.

slide6.title: Quality
slide6.subtitle: Exceptional Craftsmanship
slide6.description: Every fixture is meticulously engineered and quality-assured, ensuring durability, performance, and lasting beauty that exceeds the highest international standards.

slide7.title: Vision
slide7.subtitle: Illuminating Your Future
slide7.description: Embracing tomorrow's possibilities today. We envision a world where intelligent lighting transforms how we live, work, and experience our surroundings.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Get in touch with our offices around the world
contactPage.selectCountry: Select a country to view contact details

china.description: Al-Burhan's presence in China represents our commitment to manufacturing excellence and innovation. Through our strategic partnerships and state-of-the-art facilities, we deliver world-class lighting solutions that combine quality craftsmanship with cutting-edge technology, serving markets across the globe.

kuwait.description: Al-Burhan Regional has been a cornerstone of the lighting industry in Kuwait for over two decades. Our extensive network of branches across the country ensures accessibility and exceptional service to clients throughout the region, from residential to commercial projects.

dubai.description: In the heart of Dubai, Al-Burhan Hegazi serves as our gateway to the dynamic Middle Eastern market. We bring innovative lighting solutions to one of the world's most ambitious architectural landscapes, contributing to iconic projects that define modern luxury and sophistication.

introduction.title: About Al-Burhan
introduction.description: Al-Burhan Group is a leading provider of innovative lighting solutions with over 20 years of industry experience. We combine quality, expertise, and customer satisfaction to deliver exceptional lighting services across the region.
introduction.additionalInfo: With hundreds of successful projects worldwide, including in China, Kuwait, UAE, and Egypt, Al-Burhan Group has established itself as a trusted name in lighting.
introduction.thirdParagraph: From cutting-edge LED technologies to elegant designer collections, we transform visions into reality, creating inspiring lighting experiences that elevate every space.

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.mainDescription: With more than 20 years of experience in the lighting industry, Al Burhan Regional has successfully established itself as one of the leading providers of comprehensive lighting solutions in the State of Kuwait. Our commitment to quality, innovation, and professional service has enabled us to deliver reliable lighting solutions for residential, commercial, governmental, and industrial projects.
aboutPage.journey: Our journey began in Kuwait, where we built our foundation and reputation in the lighting market. As our expertise grew and demand for our services increased, we expanded our operations regionally and internationally. Today, Al Burhan Regional Lighting proudly operates branches in:
aboutPage.expansion: This expansion reflects our vision of becoming a regional leader capable of delivering advanced lighting solutions across the Middle East and beyond. We have become the Burhan Group, which includes a group of companies around the world.

whatWeOffer.title: What We Offer
whatWeOffer.description: We provide a fully integrated range of lighting services:

lightingDesign.title: Lighting Design
lightingDesign.item3: Fixture selection tailored to architectural and decorative needs

lightingSupply.title: Lighting Supply
lightingSupply.item1: A wide range of high-quality indoor and outdoor lighting products
lightingSupply.item2: Downlights, spotlights, LED strips, linear lighting, decorative fixtures, façade lighting, and more
lightingSupply.item3: Products selected from trusted global brands

supplyInstall.title: Supply & Install (Turnkey Solutions)
supplyInstall.item3: On-site coordination with contractors and consultants to ensure optimal results

afterSales.title: After-Sales Support
afterSales.item3: Alternative solutions for future upgrades or modifications

sectorsWeServe.title: Sectors We Serve
sectorsWeServe.description: We cover a wide range of project sectors, including:
sectorsWeServe.closing: Whether it is a private villa, office building, retail shop, restaurant, or governmental facility, we provide the most suitable lighting solutions based on project requirements and budget.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the top provider of advanced lighting solutions in Kuwait and the regional market, offering modern, efficient, and high-quality products that enhance both functionality and aesthetics.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To deliver complete lighting solutions through:

founder.name: Mr. Murtaza Bohra
founder.quote:
Twenty years ago, all I had was a small dream to bring something different to the world of lighting.

We started with humble steps, and over time that dream grew. Today, it has become a name we are proud of Al Burhan Group.

Every achievement we've made is the result of hard work, dedication, and belief that success comes from honesty and persistence.

I'm proud of everyone who has been part of this journey, and of every light we've brought into people's lives.

Our journey is far from over. Every new project is a new beginning, a new dream to shine brighter.

coFounder.name: Mr. Shabbir Hussain
coFounder.quote:
It all began with a simple idea to create lighting that inspires and beautifies every space.

Today, that dream has become a reality under the name Al Burhan Group, where quality and creativity are at the heart of every project.

The journey has been full of challenges, but it has taught us that determination, hard work, and a belief in innovation make all the difference.

I am proud of everyone who has been part of this journey, and of every light we have shared to bring warmth and beauty into people's lives.

Because we still believe in the dream, every new step is an opportunity to shine even brighter and turn ideas into radiant realities.
